channel.title: Dropbox on Al's Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Dropbox on Al's Ramblings

item.title: quick-sidestep-as-i-needed-to-get-some
item.description: A quick sidestep as I needed to get some files up to share with my sister in-law so I thought I’d enable dropbox on this new desktop. Documented here as there seems to be some disparate inaccurate bits of info
